_description: Filename pattern -> routing rules for M1A File Intake. Files are manually labeled during intake with standardized suffixes. This JSON maps those patterns to document types, expected studies, and routing decisions.
_source: Visual Decision Tree v0.19.0 M1A section, LLM Framework v0.16 Part 1.0, Codified Logic Tree v0.16.5 Stage 0-1

_INCOMPLETE.description: Fax/document not complete. Request full document from sender.
_INCOMPLETE.human_action: Fax back request for complete document. Include blank Rx form.

_MSLT.description: Multiple Sleep Latency Test -- not a service we provide.
_MSLT.human_action: Fax UTS (Unable to Schedule) to referring provider.

_MWT.description: Maintenance of Wakefulness Test -- not a service we provide.
_MWT.human_action: Fax UTS (Unable to Schedule) to referring provider.

_POX.description: Pulse oximetry -- courtesy test. Bypasses normal authorization workflow.
_POX.human_action: Process as courtesy test. Minimal documentation required.

_Chart Notes.description: Chart notes without a separate order. Check Path C (order language in notes).
_Chart Notes.notes: No CPT in filename -- order scope determined from note content in M2A.

_95811.description: PAP titration order. Requires prior positive diagnostic.

_95810,95811.description: Full scope order -- diagnostic + titration. Split night evaluation eligible.

_95806,95810.description: Diagnostic scope -- HST and/or PSG. Test selection in M4.

_95806,95810,95811.description: Complete scope -- all tests authorized by physician.

_95782.description: Pediatric PSG (age 2-5). Verify age at anticipated service date.

_95783.description: Pediatric titration (age 2-5). Requires prior positive diagnostic.

default_pattern.description: Filename doesn't match known patterns. Process through OCR and determine scope in M2A.

parsing_rules.cpt_codes: If suffix contains comma-separated numbers, parse as CPT array
